# We cut our cloud bill by 70%

Huddle01 VMs

Huddle01 VMs [...] Huddle01 VMs

@new\_user\_\_\_0932026a86e905cf4b2b7f7 amazing point, but while building Huddle01 Cloud we made sure the balance of cost and speed is managed the whole stack is controllable by CLI or Terraform without any major changes in your arch  
  
we moved many companies off of GCP and AWS and got a lot of real life idea on how to do it

Adrin D'souza
Kim Personal Health Assistant

Kim Personal Health Assistant [...] Huddle01 VMs

Most devs I talk to are quietly overpaying AWS or GCP. Not by a little but by a lot.

We've been building Huddle01 Cloud for a while now and honestly, the pricing difference is wild. Same bare-metal performance, global edge infrastructure with sub-100ms latency, no egress fees, no hidden markups.

What's everyone paying for cloud compute right now? Curious if others have found good alternatives.

results.title: Alicorn Cloud: Switch between AWS, GCP and Azure in one click | Product Hunt
results.content: repository at. No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for Alicorn Cloud. [...] Alicorn Cloud: Switch between AWS, GCP and Azure in one click | Product Hunt [...] 3 major providers. This means 3 years free ✅ Deploy containers, webapps, functions, databases, storage, etc ✅ Get DevOps best practices out of the box, like Terraform and CI / CD ✅ Best in class hosted free tier with 8gb RAM - you can actually run production on it Alicorn offers not one but 2 free plans: • Start on our hosted PaaS similar to Vercel or Heroku, then move to AWS later • Connect your AWS account right away 👉 To get started, simply connect your GitHub or GitLab repository at.
